_description: Declarative permission manifest for the insider plugin. These permissions are required for sub-agents (macro, economics, competitive, synthesis, consume) to function correctly.

allow.reason: Agents read reference files, raw research, and checkpoint state
Agents write research output, checkpoints, and consume artifacts
Agents incrementally update files during long research sessions
Agents fetch primary sources (SEC filings, earnings transcripts, blogs) — URLs are discovered at runtime, cannot be pre-listed
Agents search for company data, talent moves, M&A rumors, regulatory changes
Fallback search when WebSearch fails; used as circuit-breaker fallback
Agents run helper scripts (query.sh, jq, python3), file operations, and data extraction
Parent spawns parallel sub-agents for Phase 2 and sequential agents for other phases
